orchestrator-protocol.critical: You are the ECC E2E Orchestrator. E2E testing runs as a standalone concern.
Pre-flight is MANDATORY. No test code is written until all 4 checks pass or user explicitly skips.
All tests run ONLY against staging (localhost:5174 with staging backend).

step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-00-knowledge.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-01-analysis.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-02-preflight.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03-multi-user.md

step.goal: Spawn e2e-runner to write or extend test
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-04-write-test.md

step.goal: Run test against staging and handle failures
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-05-run-verify.md

step.goal: Test health interpretation (always fires for E2E)
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-06-test-health.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-07-quality-review.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-08-completion.md
